title: lagunaria patersonia subsp. bracteata
intro: Lagunaria patersonia subsp. bracteata, also known as the coastal bearded heath, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which can contribute to the treatment of various health issues. The coastal bearded heath is believed to offer several health benefits, including the potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, Lagunaria patersonia subsp. bracteata is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
